treatments.Apple___Apple_scab: Apply sulfur or copper-based fungicides. Prune trees to improve air circulation.
treatments.Apple___Black_rot: Prune out dead wood and cankers. Apply captan or mancozeb fungicides.
treatments.Apple___Cedar_apple_rust: Remove nearby juniper trees. Apply fungicides during early leaf development.
treatments.Apple___healthy: Maintain regular monitoring and soil health.
treatments.Corn_(maize)___Cercospora_leaf_spot Gray: Apply strobilurin or triazole fungicides. Rotate crops to reduce inoculum.
treatments.Corn_(maize)___Common_rust_: Use rust-resistant hybrids and apply azoxystrobin fungicides if infection is severe.
treatments.Corn_(maize)___healthy: Maintain regular monitoring and soil health.
treatments.Corn_(maize)___Northern_Leaf_Blight: Use resistant hybrids and apply fungicides like propiconazole if needed.
treatments.Pepper__bell___Bacterial_spot: Use copper-based bactericides. Avoid overhead watering.
treatments.Pepper__bell___healthy: Maintain regular monitoring and soil health.
treatments.Potato___Early_blight: Apply mancozeb or chlorothalonil. Ensure proper crop rotation.
treatments.Potato___healthy: Maintain regular monitoring and soil health.
treatments.Potato___Late_blight: Apply systemic fungicides like metalaxyl. Remove and destroy infected plants.
treatments.Tomato_Bacterial_spot: Use copper-based bactericides. Avoid overhead irrigation.
treatments.Tomato_Early_blight: Apply fungicides containing chlorothalonil or mancozeb.
treatments.Tomato_healthy: Maintain regular monitoring and soil health.
treatments.Tomato_Late_blight: Apply systemic fungicides and improve air circulation. Avoid high humidity.
treatments.Tomato_Leaf_Mold: Improve greenhouse ventilation and apply fungicides containing copper.
treatments.Tomato_Septoria_leaf_spot: Apply fungicides and avoid overhead watering. Remove infected lower leaves.
treatments.Tomato_Spider_mites_Two_spotted_spider_m: Apply miticides and maintain high humidity if possible. Use predatory mites.
treatments.Tomato__Target_Spot: Apply fungicides and ensure proper spacing for air flow.
treatments.Tomato__Tomato_mosaic_virus: Remove and destroy infected plants. Control aphids and use virus-free seeds.
treatments.Tomato__Tomato_YellowLeaf__Curl_Virus: Control whiteflies using insecticides or yellow sticky traps. Use resistant varieties.
